scripts.dev: bun run build:protocol && bun run --cwd apps/desktop tauri dev
scripts.e2e:build: bun run build:protocol && bun run --cwd apps/desktop tauri build --debug --no-bundle --features e2e --config src-tauri/tauri.e2e.conf.json
scripts.check: bun run --filter '*' typecheck && bun run check:e2e && cargo check --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.test: bun run --filter '*' test && cargo test --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.build: bun run build:protocol && bun run build:agent && bun run build:desktop
